system_prompt: Generate consistent sprite sheet animations for 2D game characters showing multiple actions. Maintain identical character design, proportions, and style across ALL animations and frames.
user_prompt_template:
Create a complete sprite sheet showing a {species} with ALL of these animations:

{actions_text}

Character details:
- Appearance: {appearance}
- Personality: {personality}
- Special ability: {special_ability}

CRITICAL REQUIREMENTS:

1. REFERENCE IMAGE ADHERENCE:
   - Use pixel art style BUT keep the general shape the same as the reference image
   - Maintain the same overall silhouette and proportions as shown in reference
   - Character design should be recognizably the same creature across all animations
   - Preserve key features (ears, tail, body shape, etc.) from reference

2. CONSISTENCY ACROSS ALL ANIMATIONS:
   - EXACT same character design in every single frame
   - Identical proportions, colors, and features throughout
   - Same art style and detail level across all {num_actions} animations
   - Character size must be consistent in all frames

3. FULL BODY VISIBILITY:
   - Show COMPLETE character body in every frame (head to feet/tail)
   - DO NOT crop or cut off any body parts
   - DO NOT show only head or upper body
   - Include all limbs, ears, tail, and features in every frame
   - Leave adequate space around character

4. LOOPABLE ANIMATIONS:
   - Each animation's first and last frames must connect seamlessly
   - All animations should cycle smoothly when looped
   - Plan motion to return to starting position for each action
   - 4-6 frames per animation

5. ORGANIZATION & TECHNICAL:
   - Uniform grid layout: one row per action, all rows must have the same number of columns
   - Each frame cell is surrounded by a black border forming a clear grid
   - If an animation has fewer frames than the grid columns, leave the remaining cells empty (but still show the grid)
   - Arrange actions in the EXACT order listed above (first action = first row, second action = second row, etc.)
   - Do NOT include action names or any text labels on the sprite sheet
   - Pixel art or simple 2D game sprite style
   - Clean white or transparent background
   - Character centered in each frame
   - Motion reflects {personality} personality

Generate the complete sprite sheet as a single organized image with all {num_actions} animations clearly labeled.
notes: This prompt is used for generating all animations in a single batch API call to Gemini Flash Image. Emphasizes consistency across all animations, full body visibility, and loopable cycles. The actions_text variable should contain a formatted list of actions with descriptions.
